vocab.meaning: đút vào, bỏ nhanh vào (túi, ví)
vocab.example: I usually pop a few mints in my pocket just to keep my breath fresh throughout the day.

vocab.meaning: với lấy, đưa tay lấy (thứ gì đó mang theo)
vocab.example: Whenever I feel a bit dehydrated, I reach for the reusable water bottle that I always keep in my tote bag.

vocab.meaning: đeo vội vào, mặc nhanh vào (phụ kiện)
vocab.example: If it looks a bit bright outside, I'll slap on my sunglasses before stepping out the door.

vocab.meaning: quăng vào, ném đại vào (trong túi)
vocab.example: I tend to toss a portable umbrella in my satchel, as the weather here can be quite unpredictable.

vocab.meaning: dùng đến khi cần thiết/phương án dự phòng
vocab.example: I always carry a physical book to fall back on in case my phone battery dies during a long commute.

vocab.meaning: thắt chặt, đóng khóa (túi xách để bảo vệ đồ đạc)
vocab.example: I make sure to fasten up my backpack securely to ensure my laptop doesn't slide around while I'm walking.

vocab.meaning: bới tìm, đào lục (thứ gì đó từ đáy túi)
vocab.example: It's a bit of a hassle to dig out my house keys from the bottom of my bag every evening.

vocab.meaning: luôn mang trên người, không tháo ra
vocab.example: I keep my fitness tracker on at all times to monitor my steps whenever I'm out and about.
After checking that I have my ID, I zip up my inner pocket to keep my documents safe from pickpockets.

vocab.meaning: nhặt lấy/cầm theo (vật dụng cần thiết)
vocab.example: The last thing I do before leaving is pick up my Kindle, as I can't stand being bored on the train.
